zh.lifeSummary: 當Avicie de Beaumetz於1231年出生在法國帕-德-卡拉斯波奧梅-利斯-洛格斯時，她的父親Gilles de Beaumetz31歲，母親Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes17歲。她於1249年與Adrien de Saulty-de Guînes在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1272年享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avicie de Beaumetz于1231年出生在法国帕-德-卡拉斯波奧梅-利斯-洛格斯时，她的父亲Gilles de Beaumetz31岁，母亲Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes17岁。她于1249年与Adrien de Saulty-de Guînes在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1272年享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

variants.name: Avis
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

en.lifeSummary: When Avicie de Beaumetz was born in 1231, in Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Gilles de Beaumetz, was 31 and her mother, Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes, was 17. She married Adrien de Saulty-de Guînes in 1249, in Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1272, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avicie de Beaumetz est née en 1231, à Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Gilles de Beaumetz, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Adrien de Saulty-de Guînes en 1249, à Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1272, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Avicie de Beaumetz 1231 in Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilles de Beaumetz 31 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes 17. Sie hat 1249 in Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Adrien de Saulty-de Guînes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1272 im Alter von 41 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avicie de Beaumetz è nata il nel 1231 nel Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Gilles de Beaumetz, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Adrien de Saulty-de Guînes nel 1249, nel Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1272, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Avicie de Beaumetzが1231年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスビーウメトズ-ルeス-ロジェズで生まれた時，父Gilles de Beaumetzは31歳，母Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmesは17歳であった。1249年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスでAdrien de Saulty-de Guînesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1272年に41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Avicie de Beaumetz(이)가 1231년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 보멧즈-e스-로그스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilles de Beaumetz(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1249년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이에서 Adrien de Saulty-de Guînes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1272년 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avicie de Beaumetz nasceu em 1231, em Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Gilles de Beaumetz, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Adrien de Saulty-de Guînes em 1249, em Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1272, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avicie de Beaumetz родилась в 1231 г. в местности бомец-лeс-логесь, пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Gilles de Beaumetz было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adrien de Saulty-de Guînes в 1249 г. в местности пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1272 г. в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Avicie de Beaumetz nació en 1231, en Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Gilles de Beaumetz, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Adrien de Saulty-de Guînes en 1249, en Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1272, a la edad de 41 años.
